Class CIMGeometricEffectAddControlPoints

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CIM.dll

Represents the add control points geometric effect.

public class CIMGeometricEffectAddControlPoints : CIMGeometricEffect, IJsonSerializable

object.GetHashCode()

Remarks

Dynamically adds geometry control points to a feature to dictate the placement of markers or other effect properties that leverage control points. Control points are placed at angles or deflection based on the AngleTolerance value.

Constructors

CIMGeometricEffectAddControlPoints() 

public CIMGeometricEffectAddControlPoints()

Properties

AngleTolerance

Gets or sets the value below which a control point will be placed.

public double AngleTolerance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Remarks

The maximum amount of deflection from one segment to another at a vertex. Angle values between 180 and 360 are interpreted the same as values between 0 and 180. Angle values of 180 and 360 are the same as 0.
